description: Repositories promoted into the ranked value tier — latent value discovered, build-out may follow.

ranked.thesis: Portable, platform-independent digital-memorial archive format — a lossless, exportable bundle of a person's photos/audio/text/objects/arrangement. The defensible atom of the DESIGN_ONLY metaverse spec: reusable across the estate, aligned with the B2B white-label memorial revenue path, and buildable now in the existing TS stack.
ranked.first_task: Implement the MemorialArchive format in src/ — typed schema + serialize/deserialize/validate with a lossless round-trip test.
